**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of what problem or friction you're experiencing.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What should CharClaw do?

**Which part of the app does this affect?**
[ ] Web app  [ ] Desktop app  [ ] Daemon (local runtime)  [ ] Issue Board  [ ] Skills Library  [ ] Agent CLI support

**Additional context**
Any mockups, examples, or links that help explain the feature.
